title: The Job Application
description: A mod that adds job applications that follow you around
body:
# 📄 The Job Application – A Minecraft Mod

You're enjoying your Minecraft world, mining, building, and living free... until it shows up.

A single sheet of paper.
Floating.
Buzzing.
Persistent.

It’s The Job Application, and it has only one goal:
To make you work.

This mod adds just one new entity:
- 🧾 The Job Application

It spawns rarely, but once it sees you, it will not stop. It floats after you with unsettling speed. You either run… or fight.

🗡 Your Goal:
Kill it before it hires you.
No loot. No reward.
Just peace.
Just unemployment.

Whether you’re in a hardcore world or just chilling in creative, The Job Application is always out there. Waiting. Watching. Ready to ruin your day with a job offer.

You didn’t ask for this.
You didn’t apply.
But now, you have to survive.
